title: Shield Blocks Fall
description: This mods adds one simple feature, shields block fall damage.
body: **Shield Blocks Fall** is a lightweight mod for **Minecraft NeoForge 1.21.1** that adds a smart, intuitive feature: when you're falling, simply **look straight down and raise your shield to block fall damage. **Instead of your health taking the hit, your shield absorbs the impact—with **durability loss that scales based on the shield's quality and enchantments** (like _Unbreaking III_). It’s a seamless, vanilla-friendly tweak that rewards timing, awareness, and the gear you bring on your adventures.
